title: Darakin University
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Darakin University''' was an educational institution that came under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control. [[Emiel Skoff]] once taught at the university before leaving in direct response to the Empire's seizure of the curriculum.

{{Edu-stub}}
